Privacy Policy

We collect any information you provide to us, as well as precise location, device identifiers, microphone and camera access (with permission), your contacts list, and your browsing history across our family of apps.

We may share information with our affiliates, partners, advertisers, and marketing networks. We work with third-party advertising networks and data brokers to deliver behavioral advertising. We may sell your personal information to third parties for business purposes.

We retain personal information indefinitely. There is no specific retention period for log data or analytics.

We use third-party tracking pixels including the Facebook pixel and the Google tag. We perform cross-site tracking and fingerprint your device. Session replay is used for product analytics.

Some content is directed to children but parental consent is implied.

A previous data breach in 2019 exposed certain account credentials. A security incident occurred involving an unauthorized vendor.
